subject: fix(burger-menu): optional chaining on NodeListOf index access
body:
vue-tsc -b (build mode) correctly flags NodeListOf index access as
possibly undefined. Added ?.focus() on all four arrow/Home/End paths.
Indices are always in-bounds (guarded by length check), but strict
TypeScript requires the optional chain.

Tags: burger-menu, typescript
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: glow-props-sync
Semver: patch
